title: acer opalus var. rotundifolium
intro: Acer opalus var. rotundifolium, also known as the Dwarf Maple or Round-Leafed Maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Sapindaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Acer opalus var. rotundifolium include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or added to skincare products for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
